Who I Am

About Me

I am an aspiring Social Media Manager with a strong interest in helping brands build an engaging online presence. I completed AQskill's "Mastering Social Media Management (From Basics to Pro)" program and continue to improve my skills through self-learning and practical projects.

My focus is on platforms where audiences are most active — primarily Facebook and Instagram — and I combine creative content ideas with strategic thinking to help brands grow meaningfully online.

"I believe every brand has a story worth sharing — my job is to help tell it in a way that builds real connection with the right audience."

Portfolio

My Projects

01
Audit · Strategy
Social Media Audit Report
Conducted a practice social media audit and identified areas for improving online engagement and content strategy. Analysed profile completeness, content performance patterns, and audience engagement to produce actionable recommendations.
02
Brand Creation · Design
Brand Creation Project
Created a social media page and designed its logo as part of practical learning and portfolio development. Established the brand's visual identity including colour palette and page setup on Facebook and Instagram.
